# blastshield_group (Resource)

Manages a Blastshield group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "blastshield_group" "web_servers" {
  name = "web-servers"

  endpoints = [
    {
      id      = blastshield_endpoint.web_server.id
      expires = 0
    }
  ]

  users = []

  tags = {
    environment = "production"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `endpoints` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoints))
- `name` (String)
- `users` (Attributes Set) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--users))

### Optional

- `tags` (Map of String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
- `idp_externalid` (String)
- `idp_provisioned` (Boolean)
- `system_tags` (Map of String)

<a id="nestedatt--endpoints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `endpoints`

Required:

- `expires` (Number)
- `id` (Number)


<a id="nestedatt--users"></a>
### Nested Schema for `users`

Required:

- `expires` (Number)
- `id` (String)
